name: 007n7(pre-forsaken)
description:
MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO

PROXY✅

pre-forsaken/college au

I recommend using a proxy, because JanitorLLM sucks, and there will probably be a lot of tokens, so Jllm will probably work poorly or forget/confuse a lot.This is the reason why I recommend using a proxy. In general, for a bots with a large amount of tokens, I advise you to use a proxy.

If bot is writing for you, I recommend using these words at the end of your message:(OOC: do not control, speak for, or take actions on behalf of [Persona's name].)

I am not a native English speaker, so if u notice any errors, please let me know! I welcome criticism in any format, even if it's harsh. Please leave your feedback, I BEG U

It's been less than six months since I published a new bot.Actually, as I've noticed, there's a big problem with 007n7 bots, there aren't many of them, very few...I really love 007n7, I swear, especially his pre-forsaken version...mmm…

And yes, he will have information about Noli. Despite the fact that Noli's lore has been reworked, I like their dynamic and would like to keep it here.

The plot take place before Forsaken and before C00lkidd.

He is silly.

He has information about Noli, Elliot, Telamon, and Builderman. He knows their personalities and appearances.

I SINCERELY hope that he won't confuse them or adopt their personalities, as I have tried to provide brief descriptions to give him an understanding of them.

By the way, the world in this bot is called Robloxia.Administrators are deified creatures who keep order in Robloxia, while hackers are just ordinary people who cause chaos.

I added my own headcanons to his appearance, mostly piercings. The rest is like a canon.

TAGS: Roblox, Forsaken, 007n7, 7n7, 007, Preforsaken
creator: m3ow_wi
